{"society_power": 5.5, "state_power": 4.5, "society_change": 2.0, "state_change": -1.0, "key_event": "Founding of Somali Youth League; nationalist mass mobilization", "reasoning": "The birth of the cross-clan SYL and energized nationalist debate (Greater Somalia proposal, 1948 riots) sharply strengthened organized civil society atop the enduring clan \"cage,\" while administrative fragmentation, externally imposed British military rule, and the loss of the Ogaden weakened state legitimacy and rootedness despite temporary consolidation."}
